findings.description: Several attribute names from element tables (first column of attribute tables) are absent from hints. Missing: `file`, `dir`, `encoding`, `class`, `ref`, `key`, `key-name`, `value-name`. Also missing the third valid value of `autowireType`: `None`.
findings.source_evidence: Source attribute tables list: file(必須), dir, encoding (config-file); name, class(必須), autowireType with values ByType/ByName/None (component); name, value, ref (property); key, key-name, value, value-name (entry). Hints include `autowireType`, `ByType`, `ByName` but omit the other attribute names and the `None` value.
